ksa_text: Ability to assess and comprehensively inventory organizational data assets, data flows, and technology resources to inform governance decisions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Data Governance is an edge domain for the GenAI CoE Leader, this ability KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.54) and conceptual alignment to include at the c suite level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Governance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.54). External reviewers may question whether this specific ability KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the GenAI CoE Leader versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK, EDM Council, and enterprise CDO job descriptions universally include data governance competencies for data leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Data Governance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for GenAI CoE Leader.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance ability KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.54. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the GenAI CoE Leader.
